guide.title: Financial Analysis Guide
guide.subtitle: Understand the metrics, calculations, and methodology of your financial tools.

seller_ranking.title: Seller Ranking
seller_ranking.desc: Analysis of individual performance of your sales team.
seller_ranking.methodology_desc: Ranking is based on Total Revenue (Tax Included) generated by each seller over the selected period.
seller_ranking.basket_desc: Avg Basket = Total Revenue / Number of Sales
seller_ranking.evolution_desc: Trend = Comparison with the previous period (e.g., current month vs. last month).

supplier_purchases.title: Supplier Purchases
supplier_purchases.desc: Precise calculation of what you actually owe your partners.
supplier_purchases.methodology_desc: The displayed amount corresponds to actual purchases after deducting credit notes.
supplier_purchases.formula: Total Net = (Sum of Purchase Invoices) - (Sum of Credit Notes / Returns)

scoring_performance.title: Scoring & Performance
scoring_performance.volume_desc: Based on total purchase amount over the last 12 months.
scoring_performance.quality_desc: Credit note and claim rate (fewer returns lead to a better score).
scoring_performance.regularity_desc: Frequency and constancy of your orders throughout the year.

advanced_analysis.title: Advanced Analysis
advanced_analysis.low_margin_desc: Products with high sales volume but margin < 15%.
advanced_analysis.dormant_stock_desc: High-margin products (> 40%) without significant sales for 3 months.
advanced_analysis.price_optimization_desc: Suggests a +5% adjustment on products with critical margins (< 10%).
advanced_analysis.empty_table_desc: If you see no data in the three tables above (Low Margin, Dormant Stock, or Price Optimization), it's usually a sign of excellent financial health or very strict detection thresholds:
advanced_analysis.reason_1: 01. "Low Margin" Table: Empty because all your sold products have margins above 15% (no "low margin" detected).
advanced_analysis.reason_2: 02. "Price Optimization" Table: Empty because you have no critical products with a margin below 10%.
advanced_analysis.reason_3: 03. "Dormant Stock" Table: Empty because your high-margin items (>40%) are selling well enough to not be considered tied up capital.

temporal_analysis.title: Temporal Analysis
temporal_analysis.subtitle: Analyze your best hours, days, and seasons.
temporal_analysis.best_day_summary: {{day}} is your best day with {{revenue}} on average
temporal_analysis.seasonality_summary: Analysis over {{months}} months • {{count}} seasonal products detected
temporal_analysis.no_seasonality_detected: No marked seasonal trends detected at moment.
